caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt sits in a room filled with framed photographs and clothing racks. His shirt features the white printed text "I CON NEVER DO SHIT" with smaller text below it. He is positioned behind a professional black microphone on a boom arm. In the background, a white mannequin wears a white shirt, and various racks of clothing are visible. Two logos appear on the screen: a circular black logo on the left and a red logo on the right that reads "REALLY REAL". Across the sequence, the man is speaking, shifting his facial expression from an open mouth in the first frame to a more neutral, closed-mouth expression, and then back to speaking. His head moves slightly as he talks, but his general posture and the surrounding environment remain static.
